title: kulebyaka server pack
description: Yet another vanilla-like modpack with server-ready features
body:
Yet another vanilla modpack, yet another vanilla experience, yet another optimization - so boring!

I prefer to say that this modpack brings you a stable and multiplayer-ready solution spiced up with a lot of small features and details! But mainly it provides cool endgame (ah yes, vanilla-like) content to explore and play even after you've killed the Ender Dragon. 

Some beautiful generation, some cool bosses, a lot of small items and mechanics mods to diversify your boring gameplay and also give you server-ready features with cool chat, player permissions, necessary commands etc.
